div1.entryFree: Ruby, a precious stone of a lively red colour: --es red as blood, Compl. 198. the impression of keen whips I'ld wear as --es, Meas. II, 4, 101. her nose, all o'er embellished with --es, Err. III, 2, 138. those be --es, fairy favours, Mids. II, 1, 12. the natural r. of your cheeks, Mcb. III, 4, 115. --es unparagoned (Imogen's lips) Cymb. II, 2, 17. Adjectively: ope their r. lips, Caes. III, 1, 260.
